chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-138 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 13-12-2023 Syed Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner M/s Abdul Qadir Shaikh and Abdul Basit Shaikh, Advocates for Respondents No.5 & 7 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for Municipal Committee Rohri undertakes to pay the petitioner monthly installment of Rs.100,000/- till the entire amount of about 750,000/- is fully paid. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is disposed of in the above terms. However, default in payment to the petitioner will expose defaulter to contempt proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
